design_philosophy.core_loop: Drop falling columns of three symbols, rotate to match three or more in horizontal/vertical/diagonal lines to clear them. Manage gravity cascades and accelerating fall speed until the well fills.
design_philosophy.primary_tension: Managing board state density while fall speed increases; balancing immediate matches against future board position
design_philosophy.player_fantasy: Skillful puzzle manipulation—the satisfaction of creating cascading chain reactions through deliberate symbol rotation and positioning
design_philosophy.what_makes_it_opinionated: Rotation mechanic as core decision-making tool (distinct from Tetris's rotation). Magic Jewel special pieces introduce strategic variety. Design emphasizes endless play (score-chasing) rather than finite progression, marking it as a classic arcade-style puzzle game responsive to player skill investment

difficulty.continues_system: Endless—game ends only when well fills; no explicit continue mechanic
difficulty.player_agency_in_difficulty: Column fall speed increases as player progresses, creating dynamic difficulty scaling. Player can manipulate difficulty indirectly through their play pace and risk tolerance in board management

progression.unlock_mechanism: Alternative game modes available in some ports: Flash Columns (mining puzzle variant), Doubles (cooperative), Time Trial (score race)
replayability_hooks: Endless difficulty scaling via fall speed acceleration
Symbol/jewel visual customization options (Game Gear version: fruit, squares, dice, card suits)

world_building_techniques: Art direction varies by port (Genesis: cartoon aesthetic; Game Gear: more artistic design)
Music composition references Greek mythology (Moirai: Clotho, Atropos, Lathesis)

environmental_storytelling: Well-filling visual metaphor for inevitable loss/time pressure
Cascading jewel destruction provides immediate feedback and visual satisfaction
